'''Torpris''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Torpris system/Legends|Torpris system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
It was a planet of moderate urbanization and housed the slaving consortium headquarters of the [[Drach'nam]] [[Chay Praysh]]. It had a decent number of large cities, and some of which (those under Praysh's control) were poverty-ridden. A dozen or more different non-native species inhabited the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
